hooks.command: DOC_FILES_ARR=("CLAUDE.md" "DECISIONS.md" "SESSIONS.md"); jq -n --arg content "$(for f in "${DOC_FILES_ARR[@]}"; do [ -f "$f" ] && printf '\n=== %s ===\n' "$f" && cat "$f"; done)" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: $content}}'

SCAFFOLDED=$(jq -r '.foundry.scaffolded // false' .claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || echo false); DISMISSED=$(jq -r '.foundry.dismissed // false' .claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || echo false); DATE=$(jq -r '.foundry.scaffoldedDate // ""' .claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ "$SCAFFOLDED" = "true" ]; then MSG="Foundry: Active (scaffolded $DATE)"; elif [ "$DISMISSED" = "true" ]; then MSG=""; else MSG='Foundry: not set up in this project. Run /foundry-init to scaffold it (docs, hooks, security baseline), or say "skip foundry for this project" to dismiss.'; fi; jq -n --arg msg "$MSG" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: $msg}}'
